crops.name: Maize
crops.notes: Strong option for moderate to high vigor areas with warm temperatures.

crops.name: Soybean
crops.notes: Good rotational option where canopy vigor is moderate and drainage is acceptable.

crops.name: Sorghum
crops.notes: Resilient under lower rainfall and variable heat profiles.

crops.name: Cassava
crops.notes: Suitable for warm climates with moderate soil variability.

crops.name: Tomato
crops.notes: High-value option with strong management requirements for disease and irrigation consistency.

crops.name: Pepper
crops.notes: Suitable for warm conditions with good drainage and close pest monitoring.

crop_selection_rules.reason: Lower management intensity than sensitive vegetable crops under persistent humidity.
Higher margin potential with stronger management and scouting discipline.

stage_sensitive_notes.advice: Avoid moisture and nutrient stress during reproductive windows.
Protect moisture and monitor pod-feeding pests closely.
Maintain regular irrigation and disease scouting for blight pressure.

default_recommendation.name: Maize
default_recommendation.notes: Default recommendation when precision metrics are incomplete.
